projects.title: Orders & Delivery
projects.description: At Nova Maroc, I developed an order/delivery tracking app that digitized manual processes, reducing errors and speeding up operations by 40%. The system featured real-time updates and automated reports.

projects.title: Construction Permit Management
projects.description: During my internship at Ouled Mrah Municipality, I developed a web app to digitize construction permits and automate tax calculations. This replaced paper workflows, reducing delays and errors while improving transparency.

projects.title: Library
projects.description: With 2 classmates, I developed 'Library' — a management system for cataloging books, tracking loans, and managing members. Delivered a working prototype in 3 weeks.

projects.title: CliqRDV
projects.description: For my PFE, I co-developed a healthcare web app for online appointment booking. Our solution featured doctor scheduling and patient registration.

projects.title: Lumière Privé Landing Page
projects.description: This project focuses on creating a premium and elegant user experience inspired by luxury concierge services, with multi-language support & light/dark mode toggling.

projects.title: Ecommerce
projects.description: Modern ecommerce landing page (React + Tailwind) with multi-language support & light/dark mode toggling.

projects.title: Trading Web Application
projects.description: TimeTravel – Crypto & Stock Investing Platform (Private, Commercial Project) with multi-language support & light/dark mode toggling.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: My personal developer portfolio built with Next.js, featuring smooth animations, internationalization, and a polished dark/light theme.

projects.title: MY_Calculator
projects.description: A simple calculator with basic functions that I created.
